case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CHANIMKA LARIEAU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LARIEAU, CHANIMKA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARIEAU, CHANIMKA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 43 BROOKDALE AVE. S.F. CA. 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY $4.26 PER DAY AS TO DEFENDANT LARIEAU, CHANIMKA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT LARIEAU, CHANIMKA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED FEB-26-2005, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LARIEAU, CHANIMKA
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LARIEAU, CHANIMKA
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KARAYEL, SUZAN SUBSTITUTED FOR EVJE, ARNOLD WALTER AS ATTORNEY FOR SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
